sections.sectionTitle: Sinai-ah Israel Mi Phazah A Kisimna

verses.text: Amaute, Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum nihna, a kha nihna a ni masa ni-in, Sinai sehnel gam kikhopna puanbuk sungah Topa in Moses hopihin hih bangin ci hi
“Nang leh Aaron in Israel mihonte khempeuh a innkuankuan, a behbehin, pasal peuhmah a milipin a phazah sim un
Israel sungah kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah a pha, galdo dingin a kuan thei ding mi khempeuh a honhonin na sim ding uh hi
A minam simin a beh sungah a lutang ahi mi khat ciat in hong huh ding uh hi
No hong huh dingte' min: Reuben sung panin Shedeur' tapa Elizur
Simeon sung panin Zurishaddai' tapa Shelumiel
Judah sung panin Amminadab' tapa Nahshon
Issakhar sung panin Zuar' tapa Nethanel
Zebulun sung panin Helon' tapa Eliab
Josef tapate, Efraim sung panin Ammihud' tapa Elishama, leh Manasseh sung panin Pedahzur' tapa Gamaliel
Benjamin sung panin Gideoni' tapa Abidan
Dan sung panin Ammishaddai' tapa Ahiezer
Asher sung panin Okran' tapa Pagiel
Gad sung panin Deuel' tapa Eliasaf
Naftali sung panin Enan' tapa Ahira ahi hi,” a ci hi
Hihte pen mihon sung panin a kiteel, amau' phung sung panin a makaite, Israel behte' lutangte ahi uh hi

Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses leh Aaron in a min kilosa hih mite khawmin, a kha nihna a ni masa ni-in amaute in kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah a pha peuhmah a milipin a innkuankuan, a behbehin amau leh amau a kiciamteh mihon buppite khawm uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Sinai sehnel gamah amaute a phazah a sim hi

Kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah a pha pasal peuhmah, a milipin, a innkuankuan, a behbehin, galdo dingin a kuan thei khempeuh, Israel' tacil Reuben suanlekhakte-a kipanin a mi phazah a sim uh a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Reuben minam tul sawmli leh tul guk leh za nga a pha hi. Simeon minam tul sawmnga leh tul kua leh za thum a pha hi. Gad minam tul sawmli leh tul nga leh za guk leh sawmnga a pha hi. Judah minam tul sawmsagih leh tul li leh za guk a pha hi. Issakhar minam tul sawmnga leh tul li leh za li a pha hi. Zebulun minam tul sawmnga leh tul sagih leh za li a pha hi. Efraim minam tul sawmli leh za nga a pha hi. Manasseh minam tul sawmthum leh tul nih leh za nih a pha hi. Benjamin minam tul sawmthum leh tul nga leh za li a pha hi. Dan minam tul sawmguk leh tul nih leh za sagih a pha hi. Asher minam tul sawmli leh tul khat leh za nga a pha hi. Naftali minam tul sawmnga leh tul thum leh za li a pha hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi a vekpi, kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah, abeh behin, Israel sung pan galdo dingin a kuan thei pasal peuhmah: A vekpi-in tul za guk leh tul thum leh za nga leh sawmnga a pha hi.
Ahih hangin Levi mite in amau' nam min mah a tuamin pua uh ahih manin adangte tawh kisimkhawm lo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses kiangah
“Levi minamte na sim kei ding a, Israel mite lakah amaute na simkhawm kei ding hi

Ahih hangin Levi mite pen thuciamna biakbuk leh a sung nazat khempeuh, leh tua tawh a kisai na khempeuh a uk dingin seh in. Amaute pen biakbuk leh a nazat khempeuh a pua dingte hi a, amaute in a biakbuk semin, a kimkotah phual sat ding uh hi
Biakbuk a kikhin ding ciangin Levi mite in phel ding uh a, biakbuk a kilam ding ciangin Levi mite mah in lam ding uh hi. Midang khat peuhpeuh in tua nasep a sep leh tua mi kithat ding hi
Israel mite in a milipun amau' giahphual ciat leh a dialkhai gei ciat uhah a pawlpawlin a puanbuk uh lam ding uh hi
Ahih hangin Israel mihonte tungah hehna a omlohna dingin thuciamna biakbuk kiimah Levi mite bek in phual sat ding uh a, Levi mite bek in thuciamna biakbuk kem ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua bangin Israel mite gamta uh a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in a sem uh hi.
